mapper.sql: id, email, password, phone, name, avatar_url, role, adopter_status, id_card, address, bio, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, phone, name, avatar_url, role, adopter_status, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{name}, #{avatarUrl}, #{role}, #{adopterStatus}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM users WHERE role = #{role} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM users WHERE adopter_status = #{adopterStatus} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role} AND deleted = 0
